headline: Is Uber Technologies, Inc. (UBER) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is UBER a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Uber Technologies, Inc. on R. Dennis’s Substack by OppCost. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on UBER. Uber Technologies, Inc.’s share was trading at $75.13 as of March 6th. UBER’s trailing and forward P/E were 15.88 and 22.42 respectively according to […]

headline: Lucid’s Midsize EV And Robotaxi Push Confronts Ongoing Share Price Pressure
summary: Lucid Group (NasdaqGS:LCID) has introduced an all new midsize EV platform featuring the Cosmos and Earth SUVs, targeting a broader slice of the electric vehicle market. The company also outlined expanded robotaxi plans, including concept vehicles and fleet partnerships with Uber and Nuro. Lucid highlighted in house AI systems and manufacturing refinements aimed at improving efficiency and scalability across its operations. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:LCID, this update comes against a...
